infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TourGuide uses your location to show nearby tours and guide you along your selected route with turn-by-turn navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TourGuide needs background location access to provide navigation guidance and notify you when you approach tour stops, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TourGuide needs camera access to let you capture and share photos at tour stops for check-ins and reviews.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TourGuide needs access to your photo library to let you upload photos from tour stops and share your experiences.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TourGuide would like to save tour photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TourGuide uses your location to show nearby tours and provide navigation guidance.
